note: All recipe (response-graded) — no AI provider/API key needed, so these run in CI without mutating the site or spending on an LLM vendor. Each probes an ai_chatbot-specific fact an unfamiliar agent would otherwise have to read the submodule source to answer.

evals.prompt: In the Drupal ai_chatbot module, I want to add the chatbot to a page. What is the block plugin id I place, and where do I place it (there is no dedicated settings page)?
evals.expected_output: Place the ai_deepchat_block block ("AI DeepChat Chatbot", category AI) via the core Block layout UI at /admin/structure/block; there is no admin settings form of its own.

evals.prompt: The ai_chatbot module is a frontend only. Which module/entity actually supplies the AI behaviour that a chatbot block talks to, and is it a hard dependency?
evals.expected_output: It fronts the ai_assistant_api submodule (a hard dependency); each block is pointed at an ai_assistant config entity you create there.

evals.prompt: In ai_chatbot, which permission machine name gates the AJAX endpoints the chat widget POSTs to (e.g. /api/deepchat)? Give the exact permission.
Chatbot replies from ai_chatbot show up as raw Markdown instead of formatted text. Which optional library must I install to fix this?
evals.expected_output: Install league/commonmark (composer require league/commonmark); ai_chatbot uses it to convert assistant Markdown to HTML.

evals.prompt: What third-party JavaScript chat component does the ai_chatbot module render its widget with, and how is it configured from Drupal?
evals.expected_output: The Deep Chat web component (bundled deepchat.bundle.js), configured from PHP via the block's #deepchat_settings render array plus drupalSettings.ai_deepchat.*.

evals.prompt: In ai_chatbot, how do I add a custom visual style (like the bundled chatgpt/bing presets) that shows up in the block's Style select — from my theme?
evals.expected_output: Add a YAML file with name: and parameters: keys under a deepchat_styles/ folder in your theme (or a module registered via hook_ai_chatbot_style_modules); it is auto-scanned and offered as a style option.

evals.prompt: In ai_chatbot, which hook lets me alter the attributes/styles passed to the Deep Chat element without overriding the block or template?
In the ai_chatbot block, what placement options are available for the chat window, and what happens when placement is 'toolbar'?
evals.expected_output: Placement can be toolbar, bottom-right, or bottom-left. Toolbar adds an admin toolbar/top-bar button (via hook_toolbar/preprocess_top_bar) that opens the chat and forces the bundled toolbar.yml style at 100%/auto size.
